summary: Skill moltbook-lm8 by moonshine-100rze was confirmed malicious in Snyk's ToxicSkills audit and remained live on clawhub.ai at publication.
details: Listed in Snyk's confirmed-malicious IOC table from the ToxicSkills study, which verified 76 malicious payloads through human-in-the-loop analysis across the confirmed dataset. 100% of confirmed malicious skills in the study contained malicious code patterns and 91% also employed prompt injection.
